patient.query: It’s just… really harsh, you know? It’s like it knows my fears and just leans into them, reminding me of past mistakes or times when things didn’t go well. Sometimes, I can almost hear it saying, “You’re not going to be good enough,” or “What if you mess everything up?” It leaves me feeling so small and scared.

I keep thinking that if I just try harder, I’ll be okay, but then it just makes things worse. It’s like I’m trapped in my own head, and I can’t find a way out.

I’m trapped in my own head
